creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
After I had to upgrade from FreeBSD-11 to FreeBSD-12 (since new Qt5 now do not work with base OpenSSL, and some other problems), I migrated from graphics/drm-fbsd11.2-kmod to graphics/drm-fbsd12.0-kmod obviously.

May be it is a wrong port I am complaining, but there was no such behaviour previously (on -11 branch).

When it've loaded amdkms.ko from rc.conf line, I get the error periodicaly on console (no X-server loaded yet):

[drm:radeon_vga_detect] VGA-1: probed monitor but no|invalid EDID

and my poor old monitor blinks which is not good for it or my eyes.
I suppose it is something to do with my upgrade and drm-fbsd12.0-kmod port, since it was not with 11.2 version.
